name: Acapulco Chicken (En Escabeche)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Minced jalapeno chili with seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a heavy saucepan, bring broth and pickling spice to a boil.
3. Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into another saucepan, reserving the liquid.
4. Add chicken, onion, vinegar, garlic, oil, and cumin to the saucepan.
5. Simmer over very low heat until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
6. Transfer the chicken and onions to a shallow dish.
7. Top with bell peppers and minced chili.
8. Reduce the cooking liquid in a separate saucepan by simmering it for about 10 minutes until reduced to two-thirds of its original volume.
9. Pour the reduced liquid over the chicken and let cool for 30 minutes.
10. Stir in cilantro leaves.
11. Cover and refrigerate until the chicken is well chilled, turning occasionally, about 4 hours (can be prepared up to one day ahead).
12. Slice the chicken and serve with marinated vegetables and some juices on top of tortilla chips.
